wordplay_note: An absurd name for the author of their sacred text
card_description: Ignatz Specktowsky (meaning "Specktowsky = bacon-man (comic Slavic)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Maze of Death*. Author of the theological text How I Rose from the Dead in My Spare Time. Name note: An absurd name for the author of their sacred text. Theology as hobby — the sacred reduced to self-help literature. First appears in *A Maze of Death*.

reference.brief: Author of the theological text How I Rose from the Dead in My Spare Time
reference.significance: Theology as hobby — the sacred reduced to self-help literature
